## Type of Change

<!-- Check [x] all types that apply -->

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `hotfix` — Urgent production bug fix
- [ ] `style` — Visual / CSS formatting (no logic change)
- [ ] `refactor` — Refactoring without external behavior change
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation update
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance, dependencies, build scripts
- [ ] `build` — Build system or external dependency change
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD workflow or Docker update
- [ ] `security` — Security patch
- [ ] `infra` — Infrastructure update
- [ ] `db` — Database change (migrations, seeds)
- [ ] `a11y` — Accessibility improvement
- [ ] `i18n` — Internationalization / translation update
- [ ] `revert` — Revert previous change

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages and branch names strictly follow the project's English-only convention ([COMMIT_CONVENTION.md](./COMMIT_CONVENTION.md))
- [ ] Tested locally and verified functionality
- [ ] No debugging code or `console.log` statements left behind
- [ ] PR has a focused scope (one feature or fix per PR)
- [ ] Documentation updated where applicable
- [ ] No sensitive data or hardcoded secrets exposed
